title: Turret TaCZ Addon
description: Automated TaCZ-compatible turrets for Minecraft Forge 1.20.1, including direct-fire emplacements, advanced placement previews, and an 81mm mortar. (Some textures are still placeholders.)
body:
# Turret TaCZ Addon 

Turret TaCZ is a Minecraft Forge 1.20.1 addon for Timeless and Classics Zero (TaCZ) that adds deployable automated turrets with GeckoLib animations, advanced placement previews, ammo management, access control, and indirect fire support. (turret currently placed in the MISC category of the gunsmith table)

### ❤️ Support

If you enjoy this mod and want to support its development and future updates, you can do so here: 
https://ko-fi.com/markusotto

## Features

- Deployable automated turrets built around TaCZ weapons
- Shared control GUI with ammo, status, filters, access rules, and behavior settings
- Advanced placement preview with facing lock, reach testing, elevation feedback, and nearby resupply detection
- Nearby container resupply support
- Turret pickup with saved inventory and state
- Automatic and manual 81mm mortar targeting

## Current Turrets

- Turret .308: heavy support (TEXTURE : YES)
- Dual 5.56 Turret: suppression (TEXTURE : SOON)
- 45-70 Sniper Turret: long-range precision (TEXTURE : YES)
- 81mm Mortar Turret: indirect fire support (TEXTURE : SOON)
- ????? (TEXTURE : SOON)
- ????? (TEXTURE : SOON)

## Basic Controls

- Right-click with a turret item to deploy it
- Sneak + right-click a placed turret to pick it back up
- Sneak-place or sprint-place to snap placement to the 4 cardinal directions
- Press V to lock or unlock the placement preview
- Press C to test whether the pointed location is reachable
- Hold C for 2 seconds to clear the last reachability markers

## Requirements

- Minecraft Forge 1.20.1
- Timeless and Classics Zero (TaCZ) 1.1.7+
- GeckoLib 4.8.2+

## Early Beta Status

This project is currently in early beta. Core gameplay systems are functional and tested in solo play, but the visual pass is not finished yet.

Some turrets currently have missing, placeholder, or unfinished textures. Multiplayer logic has been reviewed and prepared, but real-world multiplayer testing is still limited in this first public release.

## Known Limitations

- Multiplayer testing is still limited for this first public build
- Piston interaction is not guaranteed
- Some textures and visual polish are still work in progress

## Community Contributions

If you would like to help improve the visual side of Turret TaCZ, texture contributions are welcome.

Any original texture contribution that is accepted into the mod will be credited on the project page.
